Study in Germany from Sri Lanka

Germany offers world-class education with tuition-free public universities — but applications can be complex. German.lk helps you build a strong, mistake-free profile with AI-powered checklists, expert review, and a client portal that keeps everything on track.

Pathways Study in Germany

Who This Is For

  • Students planning Bachelor's, Master's, or PhD programmes
  • Those who want low tuition options and long-term pathways
  • Applicants who want a structured process and clear documentation

What You Get with German.lk

Contract-First Deliverables

No surprise fees — clear scope in your signed agreement

Fintiba Official Partner

Blocked account guidance where applicable to your pathway

Portal Workflow

Tasks, uploads, timelines, and status tracking in one place

Invoices & Bank Transfers

Transparent, traceable payments only

The Germany Study Process

1

Eligibility & Pathway Fit

Public vs private, course match, intake timing assessment

2

Document Readiness

Education, language, finances, identity — all checked

3

Application Execution

Checklists, formats, review cycles through the portal

4

Visa Readiness

Blocked account + insurance guidance, appointment prep

5

Departure & Onboarding

Support package-dependent — guidance when you need it

Common Mistakes We Help You Avoid

  • Wrong course matching or weak motivation structure
  • Missing or inconsistent documents
  • Poor formatting or unstandardised SOP/CV
  • Financial readiness gaps (blocked account planning)
  • Timing mistakes (intakes, processing windows)

Packages for Germany Study

Choose the level of support that suits your profile and budget. All packages include portal access, personalised checklists, and contract-first deliverables.

  • DIY:  Verification + format standards
  • Plus:  End-to-end for one pathway
  • Pro:  Priority handling + premium add-ons
See Packages

Study in Germany FAQ

We guide the best-fit mix based on your profile and timeline. Your strategy depends on programme availability and requirements.

Yes — guidance is included in Plus/Pro (and where relevant in your pathway plan).

It depends on intake timing and document readiness. Take the free assessment for an accurate estimate.
